mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record ( appointment_id, patient_id, doctor_id, patient_name, doctor_name, department, visit_date, chief_complaint, history_of_present_illness, past_history, physical_examination, diagnosis, treatment_plan, prescription, created_time, total_price, paid ) VALUES ( #{appointmentId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{patientName}, #{doctorName}, #{department}, #{visitDate}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{historyOfPresentIllness}, #{pastHistory}, #{physicalExamination}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatmentPlan}, #{prescription}, NOW(), #{totalPrice}, #{paid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_record SET chief_complaint = #{chiefComplaint}, history_of_present_illness = #{historyOfPresentIllness}, past_history = #{pastHistory}, physical_examination = #{physicalExamination}, diagnosis = #{diagnosis}, treatment_plan = #{treatmentPlan}, prescription = #{prescription}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, paid = #{paid} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medical_record WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
